name: Calculator
shortDescription: Simple calculator for basic arithmetic operations
fullDescription:
## Overview

A beautiful neumorphic calculator that works fully **offline** as an installable PWA.

## Features

- ➕ Addition, ➖ Subtraction, ✖️ Multiplication, ➗ Division
- Instant result display with clean neumorphic buttons
- Keyboard input supported
- Zero network requests — runs entirely in your browser

## How to Use

1. Open the app
2. Tap or type numbers and operators
3. Press `=` or **Enter** to calculate

> **Tip:** Press `C` or `Escape` to clear the display.

## Privacy

No data is collected. No internet required. Everything runs locally.

name: Color Calculator
shortDescription: Convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL color codes
fullDescription:
## Overview

Convert between **HEX**, **RGB**, and **HSL** color formats in real time. Designed for developers and designers who need quick, accurate color conversions without going online.

## Features

- 🎨 Real-time color preview as you type
- Supports `#HEX`, `rgb(r, g, b)`, and `hsl(h, s%, l%)` formats
- Instant two-way conversion between all three formats
- Copy any value with a single tap
- Fully offline — no CDN, no external fonts

## How to Use

1. Type a color value in any field (HEX, RGB, or HSL)
2. All other fields update instantly
3. The preview swatch reflects your color live

> **Tip:** Paste a hex code copied from Figma, Chrome DevTools, or any design tool directly into the HEX field.

## Privacy

No color data is sent anywhere. Runs entirely in your browser.

name: Temp Converter
shortDescription: Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin
fullDescription:
## Overview

A clean, offline-ready temperature converter. Type any value in **Celsius**, **Fahrenheit**, or **Kelvin** and all three update instantly.

## Supported Units

| Unit | Symbol | Absolute Zero |
|------|--------|--------------|
| Celsius | °C | −273.15 |
| Fahrenheit | °F | −459.67 |
| Kelvin | K | 0 |

## Formulas Used

```
F = (C × 9/5) + 32
K = C + 273.15
C = (F − 32) × 5/9
```

## How to Use

1. Type a temperature in any field
2. The other two fields update in real time
3. Install as a PWA for instant offline access

> **Tip:** Kelvin is never negative — the app will warn you if you enter a value below absolute zero.

## Privacy

No data leaves your device. No accounts. No internet required.
